title: A Fantastic Disc Pack
description: Adds random music, you like a song, It's probably on here. And if not, then I haven't done my job.
body:
I guess the mod adds all the songs below (All drop from killing  a turtle). I might add new ones in the future, if I get recommendations.

•Beach House — Peter Hont

•DareDevil — Braden Kimball (Main Title)

•Demon — King Von

•Devil In A New Dress — Kanye West

•Du Hast — Rammstein

•Feel It — d4vd

•Five Nights At Freddy's (10th Anniversary) — The Living Tombstone

•Flow — Creo

•Food Chain — Adventure Time

•If I Am With You — Yoshimasa Terui (Jujutsu Kaisen)

•Leaves from the Vine - Michael Dante DiMartino - Jeremy Zuckerman

•The Logan Poop Song — The Odd Man Who Sings About Poop Puke and Pee

•The Mariner's Revenge Song — The Decemberists

•Time — Pink Floyd

•Tom Tom — Holy F*ck

And a few secret discs that have their own unique way to obtain, from killing certain mobs, and breaking jungle themed blocks (that was a hint).
